AC1.evidence: Route added in App.tsx: <Route path='/render/:formId' element={<FormRendererPage />} />

AC2.description: On load, fetches published schema from GET /api/forms/:formId/schema
AC2.evidence: getFormSchema() in api.ts fetches from /api/forms/:formId/schema; called in FormRendererPage useEffect

AC3.description: Renders correct govuk-frontend component for each field type
AC3.evidence: FormFieldRenderer switch handles: text→TextInput, textarea→TextareaInput, date→DateInput (day/month/year), number→NumberInput (inputmode=numeric), radio→RadioInput, checkbox→CheckboxInput, select→SelectInput

AC4.description: Form title from schema displayed as <h1> using GOV.UK heading pattern

AC5.description: All rendered fields have visible labels with correct htmlFor/id association
AC5.evidence: Each field component has <label htmlFor={fieldId}> associated with <input id={fieldId}>; date uses fieldset/legend; radio/checkbox use fieldset/legend + individual labels

AC6.description: Required fields show '(required)' hint and are validated on submit
AC6.evidence: Required hint shown via (required); validateFields() checks required fields on submit

AC7.description: On submit with missing required fields: GOV.UK error summary shown at top
AC7.evidence: Error summary uses govuk-error-summary pattern with role=alert, aria-labelledby, errorSummaryRef.focus() on validation failure

AC8.description: Error summary links focus to the relevant field on activation (WCAG 2.4.3)
AC8.evidence: NEW focusFieldInput() helper added: for radio/checkbox uses document.querySelector('input[name=fieldId]') to focus first input in group; for date focuses day sub-input; for others focuses by id. onClick on error summary links calls e.preventDefault() + focusFieldInput(f). Build passes.

AC9.description: On successful submit: structured JSON payload logged/posted to confirmation endpoint
AC9.evidence: submitForm() POSTs to /api/forms/:formId/submit; backend logs payload with console.log('[FORM SUBMISSION]', ...) and stores audit entry

AC10.description: Confirmation page shows GOV.UK panel component with reference number
AC10.evidence:
ConfirmationPanel renders
with

Form submitted

and referenceNumber from API response

AC11.description: Full keyboard journey from start to submission works without mouse
AC11.evidence: All interactive elements are native HTML form controls or <a>/<button> - fully keyboard navigable; no mouse-only interactions; error summary receives focus on failure

AC12.description: GOV.UK page structure: header, phase banner (Beta), main content, footer
AC12.evidence: FormRendererPage wraps in GovLayout component which provides header, phase banner (Beta), skip link, main content, footer

AC13.description: If schema fetch fails, show GOV.UK error page with clear message
AC13.evidence: loadError state triggers govuk-error-summary block with the error message and link to return to dashboard
